note: the portico metaphor is stretched for this input.

── survey: context fitting ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

                                    ***
                                ===  ◇  ===
     ╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
     ║                        Context fitting                         ║
     ╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

    ▀██▀    ▀██▀    ▀██▀    ▀██▀    ▀██▀    ▀██▀    ▀██▀    ▀██▀    ▀██▀
     ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██
     ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██
    Stuf    Map-   Recur   Refine   Skel   Head+   Embed   Strea   Compre
    fing   reduce   sive     ██     eton    tail   dings    ming   ssion
     ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██
     ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██      ██
    ▄██▄    ▄██▄    ▄██▄    ▄██▄    ▄██▄    ▄██▄    ▄██▄    ▄██▄    ▄██▄
   ░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
  ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║                               Survey scope                               ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

legend:
  ^  Context fitting: An umbrella name for the family of techniques surveyed.
  ii Stuffing: One-shot inclusion of full input.
  ii Map-reduce: Per-chunk maps, single reduce.
  ii Recursive: Repeated bottom-up summarization.
  ii Refine: Sequential rolling refinement.
  ii Skeleton: Structural skeleton extraction.
  ii Head+tail: Truncation at both ends.
  ii Embeddings: Top-k retrieval into prompt.
  ii Streaming: Online incremental summarization.
  ii Compression: Lossy token-level shrinking.
  _  Survey scope: Recent literature 2020-2026.

───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── built with _ii^ ──
